name: Hellish Rebuke
castingTimeTrigger: which you take in response to taking damage from a creature within 60 feet that you can see
description: You point at a creature that has damaged you, and it is momentarily surrounded by hellish flames. The target makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d10 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 1.
